## What this changes

A short description of the user-visible change. Bullets fine for two-or-more discrete pieces; one sentence fine for
one focused fix.

## Why

The motivation. If this is a bug fix, link the issue. If it's a feature, sketch the use case.

## How

Brief tour of the implementation approach. Call out anything subtle, anything you went back and forth on, or
anything you'd like a reviewer to look hard at.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for the new behavior
- [ ] `make qa/full` passes locally (tests, lint, types, dogfood)
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added under `## Unreleased` (if user-visible)
- [ ] Docs updated (if the change is user-facing)
